case_title: PATRICIA IBANEZ GARDONO VS. VIOLET MAHALIA PRESCOD

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARDONO, PATRICIA IBANEZ AS TO DEFENDANT PRESCOD, VIOLET MAHALIA AN INDIVIDUAL DBA VIOLET'S HOUSECLEANING SERVICES
